transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-27]
[00:00] You: Product roadmap review for Q3. Let's go through what's committed, what's at-risk, and what we're deferring.
[00:40] Speaker 1: The notification center feature is on track for August 15th. No blockers.
[01:10] Speaker 2: The search overhaul is at-risk. We underestimated the index rebuild complexity. It might slip to September.
[01:50] You: What do we need to get it back on track?
[02:05] Speaker 2: We need two more weeks of engineering bandwidth. I'd suggest pulling Speaker 3 off the analytics dashboard work temporarily.
[02:35] Speaker 3: I can do that. If I start on Monday, I can have search back on schedule by August 22nd.
[03:00] You: Okay. Let's make that call. Speaker 3, you're moving to search starting Monday August 3rd. Can you brief your current stakeholders?
[03:20] Speaker 3: I'll brief the analytics dashboard stakeholders today about the deprioritization.
[03:45] Speaker 4: The mobile app v3.2 release is on track for August 29th. The only open item is App Store review time — I'll submit to Apple a week early on August 22nd to buffer for review.
[04:20] You: Good thinking. Speaker 1, can you update the public roadmap page on the website?
[04:35] Speaker 1: I'll update the public roadmap to reflect the search timeline adjustment by end of day tomorrow, July 28th.
[05:00] You: Great. Next roadmap review is August 24th.

action_items.description: Move to search overhaul project starting August 3rd to get it back on schedule
action_items.source_quote: If I start on Monday, I can have search back on schedule by August 22nd.

action_items.description: Brief analytics dashboard stakeholders about deprioritization
action_items.source_quote: I'll brief the analytics dashboard stakeholders today about the deprioritization.

action_items.description: Submit mobile app v3.2 to App Store review early to buffer for review time
action_items.source_quote: I'll submit to Apple a week early on August 22nd to buffer for review.

action_items.description: Update public roadmap website to reflect search timeline adjustment
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the public roadmap to reflect the search timeline adjustment by end of day tomorrow, July 28th.

decisions: Speaker 3 reassigned from analytics dashboard to search overhaul starting August 3rd
Search overhaul target adjusted from original date to August 22nd
